components.sidebar: Fixed layout, 240px-280px wide. Use distinct active states using primary text and subtle background. Hide on mobile in favor of a hamburger drawer.
components.metric_cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border. Big number (28px+). Trend indicator.
components.buttons: Rounded-md, bold text. Use primary for major actions (Submit Test). Use outline for secondary actions.
components.test_interface: Dense grid structure. Fixed header for Time Remaining. Right sidebar for Question Palette. Auto-fill grids for test screening. Row height 48-52px for scanning efficiency.
components.question_palette: Grid of small rounded squares (w-8 h-8). Green (Answered), Red (Unanswered/Wrong), Amber (Marked for Review), Gray (Not Visited).

libraries_and_tools.icons: lucide-react (default) OR @phosphor-icons/react for dense dashboard needs.
libraries_and_tools.charts: recharts (for radar, bar, and weekly performance graph).

images.description: Woman writing on book - for login/signup screen split view
Focused student for empty states or dashboard welcome banner
Young man studying for promotional areas or upgrades

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure dark mode is fully functional using Tailwind class strategy ('dark' on html). Update globals.css with the provided HSL variables.
In the test taking interface, DO NOT use huge padding. Prioritize data density so students can see long questions and options without scrolling excessively.
Implement Question Palette correctly: Answered, Not Answered, Not Visited, Marked for Review.
For the Analytics Dashboard, implement a mock GitHub-style calendar heatmap using small grid cells, and Radar/Bar charts via Recharts.
Include a 'data-testid' attribute on EVERY interactive element (buttons, tabs, inputs, palette items) to ensure automated testing succeeds.
AI Explanation chat should feel distinct, perhaps integrated below the explanation or as a sliding right panel.
Maintain high contrast for readability (APCA/WCAG standards), particularly for the question text and options.
